description: Last up to 3 years in storage Leak Resistant Design Zero Added Mercury and Cadmium Quality Seal for Trusted Power EVEREADY Super Heavy Duty is the affordable Carbon Zinc solution that provides power for you and your family's basic power needs. EVEREADY Super Heavy Duty brand offers a complete line of AA, AAA, C, D, 9V and 6V batteries and are an economical choice for clocks, flashlights, radios and other devices that are low drain. Since 1896 EVEREADY batteries have been providing dependable portable power. For every family, everywhere, every day. EVEREADY for Life.. Eveready.
